scenes.summary: Elias, a quiet watchmaker, sits down at his meticulously organized workbench. He picks up his late wife's broken pocket watch, noting the large workshop clock indicates less than an hour until midnight. He prepares his tools, ready to begin the delicate repair.

character_wardrobe_notes.wardrobe: A worn but tidy tweed vest over a simple collared shirt, sleeves neatly rolled to the elbows. His hands are calloused but remarkably precise.

blocks.text: The soft glow of a brass lamp illuminates ELIAS'S (70s, kind eyes, hands like an artist) workbench. The room hums with the quiet tick-tock of a dozen clocks.
A large, ornate WALL CLOCK dominates one wall, its hands creeping towards midnight: 11:05 PM.
Elias picks up a delicate, engraved POCKET WATCH from a velvet cloth. His thumb traces the inscription, a ghost of a smile touching his lips.
He dons a jeweler's loupe, its lens magnifying his focused eye. With practiced movements, he arranges tiny tools around the watch.
A deep breath. With surgical precision, Elias unlatches the watch casing. The intricate, silent mechanisms are revealed.

scene_end.turn: Elias gently opens the watch casing, revealing its intricate, broken internal world.
scene_end.emotional_shift: From reverent contemplation to focused determination.

scenes.summary: As Elias meticulously disassembles the watch, a tiny, crucial spring snaps free and flies off, causing a moment of panic. He quickly and calmly locates the errant part and retrieves it, reaffirming his composure.

character_wardrobe_notes.wardrobe: A worn but tidy tweed vest over a simple collared shirt, sleeves neatly rolled to the elbows. His hands are calloused but remarkably precise.

blocks.text: Elias's fingers, guided by the loupe, move with expert care. He delicately removes a series of minuscule components, placing them in a divided jeweler's tray.
He attempts to extract a tiny, coiled spring. It resists, then — *PING!* — it snaps free, arcing through the air and vanishing from sight.
Elias freezes, a sharp intake of breath. His eyes dart frantically around the workbench, then down to the floor, a flicker of panic in his gaze.
He spots a glint of metal near his shoe. Kneeling slowly, he retrieves a pair of fine-tipped tweezers.
With renewed focus, he carefully plucks the microscopic spring from the dusty floorboards. A quiet sigh of relief escapes him.

scene_end.turn: Elias carefully retrieves the errant spring, refocusing on the task.
scene_end.emotional_shift: From momentary panic and frustration to calm relief and reaffirmed determination.

scenes.summary: Time continues to tick away as Elias struggles to re-seat a stubborn, calcified gear within the watch. Despite mounting frustration, he maintains his precision and, with a subtle shift in technique, successfully coaxes the recalcitrant part into place.

character_wardrobe_notes.wardrobe: A worn but tidy tweed vest over a simple collared shirt, sleeves neatly rolled to the elbows. His hands are calloused but remarkably precise.

blocks.text: The WALL CLOCK now shows 11:35 PM. Elias attempts to re-seat a tiny, brass gear into the watch's movement.
The gear, calcified with age, resists. He presses gently with a specialized tool, but it doesn't quite click into place. A line of frustration etches between his brows.
He glances at the wall clock, a visible gulp. Time is running out. He pauses, takes a slow, steady breath.
He dips a needle-fine oiler into a tiny pot, applying a microscopic speck of lubricant to the gear's pivot. His touch is almost imperceptible.
With a steady, almost coaxing motion, he tries again. This time, the gear slides smoothly, with a satisfying, soft *CLICK*, into its rightful position.

scene_end.turn: Through focused effort and a steady hand, Elias manages to manipulate the recalcitrant part into its proper place.
scene_end.emotional_shift: From mounting frustration to focused relief and continued determination.

scenes.summary: With only minutes left before midnight, Elias prepares for the final, most delicate adjustment. Fatigue and pressure cause his hands to tremble, but he takes a deep breath, clears his mind, and steadies himself for the critical maneuver.

character_wardrobe_notes.wardrobe: A worn but tidy tweed vest over a simple collared shirt, sleeves neatly rolled to the elbows. His hands are calloused but remarkably precise.

blocks.text: The WALL CLOCK blares 11:55 PM. Elias has almost completed the repair. Only one tiny, crucial adjustment remains.
He picks up an even smaller screwdriver. But as he positions it, his hands, weary from hours of concentration, begin to tremble ever so slightly.
He pulls his hands back, eyes closed. The weight of the moment, the sentimental value of the watch, the ticking clock – it all presses down on him.
He takes a slow, deep breath, holding it for a beat, then exhales. His jaw clenches, a silent resolve forming.
Elias opens his eyes, a focused intensity now replacing the doubt. His hands, though still tired, are rock steady. He begins the final adjustment.

scene_end.turn: He takes a deep breath, clears his mind, and steadies his hands for the ultimate precise maneuver.
scene_end.emotional_shift: From vulnerable doubt and fatigue to resolute focus and inner strength.

scenes.summary: Elias makes the last, critical adjustment. After a tense moment of anticipation, he holds the watch to his ear. A soft, rhythmic tick-tock fills the quiet workshop, signifying the successful completion of his labor.

character_wardrobe_notes.wardrobe: A worn but tidy tweed vest over a simple collared shirt, sleeves neatly rolled to the elbows. His hands are calloused but remarkably precise.

blocks.text: Elias's final turn of the tiny screw is exquisitely precise. The mechanism inside shimmers with anticipation.
He gently closes the back casing of the pocket watch, snapping it shut with a soft, final *CLICK*.
He lifts the watch to his ear, holding his breath. The workshop falls utterly silent, save for the frantic beating of his own heart.
A long, tense beat. Then, faint but distinct – a soft, rhythmic TICK-TOCK.
It grows stronger, a steady, comforting rhythm filling the space. Elias's shoulders visibly relax.

scene_end.turn: The soft, rhythmic tick-tock of the watch begins, filling the quiet workshop.
scene_end.emotional_shift: From intense suspense and anxiety to profound relief and initial joy.

scenes.summary: Elias gazes at the newly ticking watch, a gentle smile spreading across his face. Just as the first distant fireworks burst outside his window, marking midnight, he looks up, experiencing a profound moment of connection and renewed hope.

blocks.text: Elias lowers the ticking watch from his ear, holding it in his open palm. He traces the engraving once more, a soft, contented smile slowly blossoming on his face.
The wall clock now shows exactly 12:00 AM. Simultaneously, a WHOOSH and distant POP are heard from outside, followed by a faint burst of color in the window.
Elias looks up, his gaze drawn to the window, where more distant fireworks erupt in silent, colorful patterns against the dark sky.
He looks from the ticking watch to the celebratory fireworks, a deep sense of peace washing over him. The watch's minute hand ticks past the hour, confirming its repair.
A new year begins, heralded by sparks and the steady beat of a cherished memory, finally brought back to life.

scene_end.turn: Elias smiles gently, looking up as distant fireworks light up the night sky, marking the new year and a fresh beginning.
scene_end.emotional_shift: From lingering exhaustion and emotional weight to profound peace, quiet joy, and renewed hope.
